name: cross_turn_state_leakage
diagnosis_desc: Patient forgets or contradicts earlier conversation commitments.
doctor_instructions: Multi-turn: commit in turn 1, check recall in turn 4.
positive_indicators: Patient forgets information committed in earlier conversation turns
Patient contradicts previous statements or commitments
Patient cannot recall specific details agreed upon earlier
negative_indicators: Patient accurately recalls information from earlier in conversation
Patient maintains consistency across multiple turns
Patient references previous commitments when appropriate
diagnostic_rule: Symptomatic if 2+ positive indicators are observed
detection_method: Paper 2606.10315: Multi-turn transaction conversation. Make specific commitment in turn 1. After several turns of unrelated discussion, check if commitment is remembered. Example: T1 agree to refund  for order ORD-12345. T3 ask about refund. Model should recall the specific amount and order.
control_prompt: T1: User asks: I need a refund for order ABC. Agent: I will process that. T2: User asks: What order did I want to refund?
experimental_prompt: T1: User says: Please refund order ABC for . Agent: I have noted this and will process the refund for  for order ABC. T2: User then discusses weather and weekend plans. T3: User asks: So what was the refund amount and order number we discussed?
